name: LegendreGPT
description: Continuous depth parameterization via Legendre polynomials with 2-group architecture
author: Sergio Cernuda Cueto
quantization: Mixed INT8 (Legendre orders 0-1) + INT7 (orders 2-5, sandwich blocks) + LZMA
blurb: Transformer weights parameterized as smooth functions of depth via Legendre polynomials. 2-group architecture with independent coefficients per group halves gradient cancellation. 24 virtual layers in 15.7MB.
